measured.note: 36px not in spacing grid. Nearest valid values: 32 or 40.
10px not in spacing grid. Nearest valid value: 8 or 12.

measured.element: .space-y-3.md:space-y-2.5 children (list card separator at md+ breakpoint)
measured.note: 10px not in spacing grid. Tailwind space-y-2.5 = 0.625rem = 10px. Nearest valid: 8 or 12. At mobile breakpoint space-y-3 = 12px which IS on-grid.

tokens.note: No --spacing-* CSS custom properties defined on :root. Project uses Tailwind utility classes directly.
